title: Geometric Linear Transformations of ℝ²
description: A visual representation of how the standard basis vectors i and j are transformed by different 2x2 matrices, showing the resulting effect on the unit square.
elements: Standard Basis Vectors i (1,0) and j (0,1)
relationships: The transformation matrix A acts on the basis vectors
i' and j' define the new edges of the transformed square
The determinant of A indicates area scaling (and sign indicates orientation)
The transformation is applied uniformly to all points in the space
